text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh, they're sold out?! I neeeed these<n>press-on
nails though!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Stop. This other shop is selling<n>them for,
like, way more expensive. Are<n>they for real?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I saw something about this on my<n>newsfeed.
Prices going up is called in...<n>invention?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... that doesn't sound right.<n>...Souffle-tion?
Whatever, I am so done<n>with these prices!
